root.name: Add appropriate icons or symbols inside each of the three circles in slide 2 to illustrate the respective text
root.description: Evaluates whether the agent has correctly placed meaningful icons or symbols inside each of the three circles in slide 2, such that each icon visually represents the text associated with its circle.

children.name: Icons or symbols added inside each of the three circles in slide 2
children.description: Checks if there are new icons or symbols inside each of the three circles in slide 2, and that the required number (3) are present.

children.name: Each icon or symbol meaningfully illustrates the respective text
children.description: Checks if each icon or symbol visually represents the text associated with its circle in a meaningful way.

scorer.function_code:
def compute_score() -> tuple[str, float]:
    # Use VLM to compare the screenshot and text for each circle
    slide = modified_ppt_screenshots[1]

    # Find circles and their associated text

    texts = ['Challenging Findings', 'Demanding Methods', 'Ingredients of a Classical Study']
    results = 0
    for text in texts:
        prompt = f"Does the icon or symbol inside the above the text {text} circle visually represent or illustrate said text? Respond 'Yes' or 'No' for each item, and briefly explain why."
        resp = vlm_call(prompt, images=[slide.image_path], temperature=0.0)
        results += int('yes' in resp.lower().strip())

    score = float(results)/len(texts)
    reason = f"Icon/text illustration scores: {score}"
    return reason, score

children.name: No unintended modifications to other slides or elements
children.description: Checks that no extraneous changes (icons, symbols, or other modifications) were made to slides or elements outside the specified circles in slide 2.

metadata.task: Add icons or symbols inside each of the three circles in slide 2 which illustrate the respective text
